message:
Add robust session persistence and error handling

- Validate credentials before saving (non-empty API key and verification code)
- Check keychain save results and throw on failure
- Store claim URL for manual recovery
- On network errors, restore from keychain instead of going to unauthenticated
- Add lastError observable for displaying errors in UI
- Add "Open Claim Page" button for manual claim recovery
- Add comprehensive logging with os.log
